question: Hypertext Transfer Protocol (HTTP)
canonical_answer: A protocol in the TCP/IP protocol suite that is used for communication between a web server and a web browser and is optimized for Internet content such as text, pictures, videos, and hyperlinks. It uses port 80.

appears_in.title: Comptia Fundamentals Study Guide

appears_in.title: Tia Cissp
appears_in.answer: The language of the World Wide Web (WWW), used by web servers and browsers for non-sensitive content. ______ operates on TCP port 80.
